headline: CERTIFY BEFORE YOU RELEASE
subheading: Why the QP's signature, not the stock status, lawfully places a batch on the market
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial pharmaceutical scene rendered in a cool teal and cyan palette over deep navy, lit by soft directional light with premium reflective surfaces. A pristine bound certification register lies open beside an elegant fountain pen resting mid-signature, symbolising the Qualified Person's personal legal act. To one side, a single sealed medicine carton sits within a glowing quarantine zone marked by a soft amber-to-green status light, while gently blurred behind it, ordered rows of finished-product cartons on stainless-steel shelving wait in saleable release, bathed in cyan light. A subtle fresh-green accent indicator threads the composition, evoking the one-way sequence from certification to release. Crisp depth of field, fine detail on documentation and packaging, authoritative and precise mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
